buildCommand: cd ../../ && pnpm --filter @workspace/jaiscape run build && mkdir -p .vercel/output/static && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync('.vercel/output/config.json',JSON.stringify({version:3,routes:[{handle:'filesystem'},{src:'/(.*)',dest:'/index.html'}]}))" && cp -r artifacts/jaiscape/dist/. .vercel/output/static/
